message:
chore(beads): expand design + acceptance_criteria across 21 git_safety_guard beads

Pure beads-tracker metadata refresh — bumps `updated_at` on 21 issues in
`.beads/issues.jsonl` and fleshes out the `design` and/or
`acceptance_criteria` fields with concrete plans the operator/agents can
work against. No code, schema, or pack-rule changes.

The affected beads break down into two groups:

- **Standalone beads with both `design` + `acceptance_criteria` updated**
  (10 beads): `git_safety_guard-{6skk, bui6, eug4, f81d, i5gd, jvkm,
  m1ic, n9j1, suap, tck0}`. These are the bead bodies that previously
  carried only a 1–2 line title + symptom; they now have the
  implementation sketch and the acceptance bar baked in so a downstream
  agent can pick them up without re-research.

- **Sub-beads with only `acceptance_criteria` updated** (11 beads):
  `git_safety_guard-{nqhi.1 .. nqhi.8, s67a, tovy, ythp}`. These hang off
  parent investigation beads and inherit their design from the parent;
  the per-sub acceptance criteria pin the exact verification steps each
  sub needs to land.

The untracked `.beads/.write.lock` is intentionally not staged — it's
the live SQLite-style write lock from `br sync` and rotates on every
flush.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
